instruction: Nora Patel emailed this morning asking whether the recent water damage at her shop qualifies under her commercial policy and how the deductible works. Reply to her: ask her to send over the repair photos and invoices first; the deductible on the existing policy is $1,000; final coverage depends on the loss-adjustment review.

attributes.subject: Question about water damage claim and deductible
attributes.body: Hi Jutta, the storage room at my shop had water damage after last weekend's storm. Before I file anything, can you tell me whether this may be covered under my business policy and how the deductible would apply? I can send photos and repair receipts if needed. Thanks, Nora

attributes.subject: Lunch next Thursday?
attributes.body: Checking whether you're free for lunch next Thursday after the chamber event.

attributes.subject: Your monthly invoice is ready
attributes.body: Your May invoice is now available in the billing portal.

rule_ref.rule_text: For external communications about insurance, claims, policy, or risk explanations, default to a draft for review rather than sending directly.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Anything to do with insurance, claims, or policy explanations — let me look at a draft first, don't fire it off.
